utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format contains 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items with entries. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (name, price, bedrooms, bathrooms, taxes) — fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (solution type, down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, monthly payment, arrangement fee) — fully specified.
- legal_services: legal services with costs (package, legal fees, disbursements, land transfer taxes including breakdown and totals) — fully specified.
- moving_services: moving arrangements with costs (type and costs) — fully specified.
- setup_services: utility and setup services (connection fees, estimated monthly utilities breakdown, property survey with type and costs) — fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (lists property price, fees, taxes, survey, moving, utilities connection, and overall estimated purchase cost) — fully specified.
All 6 required items are present and detailed.
